species: Cluster III/IV mixotroph-heterotrophs (MAGs of Hydrogenophaga, Vitreoscilla, Rubrivivax, Rhodoferax, Paucibacter)

growth_records.strain: metagenome-assembled genomes (MAG cluster), no isolate strains
growth_records.medium: 13C-bicarbonate + thiosulfate amended Hainich CZE groundwater microcosm (well H41)
growth_records.cite: Taubert, Martin et al. Bolstering fitness via CO2 fixation and organic carbon uptake: mixotrophs in modern groundwater. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01163-x. [PMC8941145]
growth_records.snippet: The vast majority of organisms represented by MAGs in these clusters exhibited generation times between 3 and 4 days (Fig. 3).
growth_records.notes: Generation time reported as a RANGE 3-4 days. Representative mu at midpoint 3.5 days: mu = ln2/(3.5*24 h) = 0.693147/84 = 0.008252 h-1; doubling_time_h = 84. Range bounds: mu = 0.009627 h-1 (3 d) to 0.00722 h-1 (4 d). Cluster/genus-level, environmental microcosm.
